lemon_market_new_listings.description: The car is in good condition.

The vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has several scratches and small dents. The interior shows visible wear and some staining on the seats. It is mechanically functional but requires regular maintenance.

This vehicle is in good condition. The engine and transmission are well-maintained and function properly. The exterior shows minor cosmetic wear consistent with age, but there is no significant rust or body damage. The interior is clean and all electronics are in working order.

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as a project or for parts. The engine has a persistent knock and heavy oil leaks, while the transmission slips significantly during shifts. Externally, there is visible rust on the wheel arches and several body panels, and the interior shows heavy wear and tear with non-functional electronics and damaged upholstery. It is currently not roadworthy and will require major mechanical and cosmetic restoration.

This vehicle is in fair condition and reflects its years of service. The engine and transmission are functional, making it a reliable option for daily commuting, though it may require some minor maintenance in the near future. Visually, the exterior has several noticeable scratches and some fading in the clear coat, and the interior shows significant wear on the driver's seat and carpets. All electronics work, but the air conditioning isn't as cold as it once was. It’s a solid, honest car for someone looking for a budget-friendly, functional ride.

Looking for a dependable daily driver? This car is a fantastic, budget-friendly option! It shows some honest wear and tear from its time on the road, but it still runs strong and offers a comfortable, reliable ride. It's a great chance to get behind the wheel of a solid vehicle that’s ready for many more miles!

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of exceptional caliber, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in pristine, showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of meticulous stewardship. Its mechanical integrity and aesthetic presentation are beyond reproach, offering an unparalleled driving experience for the discerning collector. We invite you to acquire this benchmark of luxury and performance.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for a new home. This car is in absolutely pristine, showroom condition—not a single scratch or dent to be found! It drives like an absolute dream and has been pampered since day one. If you're looking for something that feels brand new without the dealership price tag, this is the one for you. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!

Presenting a museum-grade example featuring the legendary 13B-REW sequential twin-turbocharged rotary engine. This chassis maintains its factory-spec structural rigidity and exhibits zero powertrain seepage. The drivetrain delivers linear boost response through the five-speed short-throw manual transmission, coupled with a perfectly calibrated limited-slip differential. Every suspension bushing remains pliable, ensuring the original double-wishbone geometry provides razor-sharp turn-in. The exterior retains its factory high-gloss finish with no evidence of orange peel or oxidation, while the cabin's tactile surfaces show negligible wear. Mechanically, the apex seals show optimal compression across all faces, and the cooling system has been meticulously preserved to prevent heat soak.
Mint condition. Spotless interior. No exterior damage. Full service history. Runs like new.

This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that is truly indistinguishable from new. Finished in a stunning, high-gloss metallic paint that has been professionally ceramic coated, the exterior is absolutely flawless—free from stone chips, door dings, or even the slightest swirl marks. Inside, the cabin remains a sanctuary of luxury; the premium leather seats show zero signs of wear or creasing, and the interior still retains that fresh factory scent. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the climate control, operates with out-of-the-box precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach. It has been meticulously maintained by a single owner, garage-kept since day one, and has never seen inclement weather. The engine bay is immaculate, and the car drives with the same tightness and responsiveness it had on the showroom floor. Complete with a full service history, original window sticker, and all spare keys, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class for the most discerning collector.

Presenting an exceptional vehicle of unrivaled caliber, preserved in pristine, showroom-grade condition. This specimen has been maintained to the most exacting standards, exhibiting a flawless exterior profile and an interior that retains its original factory integrity. Every mechanical component has been rigorously vetted to ensure peak performance, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from a new acquisition. This is a definitive opportunity for the discerning buyer who demands uncompromising excellence.

Presented in impeccable condition, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Meticulously maintained and strictly garaged, it exhibits no discernible wear, offering an uncompromising driving experience for the discerning collector. We invite you to acquire a specimen of unparalleled caliber.

Hey there! If you’ve been searching for a ride that feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor, you’ve found it! This beauty is in absolutely pristine condition—seriously, it’s spotless inside and out. I’ve taken incredible care of it, and it drives like an absolute dream. You’re going to love how smooth and fresh everything feels. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

This E46 M3 is a museum-grade example featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering visceral power through six individual throttle bodies. The high-revving valvetrain is perfectly synced with the double-VANOS system, providing a linear power band up to the 8,000 RPM redline. Power is managed by a crisp 6-speed Getrag manual transmission and a variable M differential lock for optimal corner-exit traction. The chassis is impeccably preserved with reinforced subframe mounting points and factory-spec suspension geometry. Finished in flawless Alpine White over a pristine Nappa leather interior, this specimen represents the pinnacle of naturally aspirated analog performance.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. Full service history. No defects.

This vehicle is a true time capsule, meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage and presenting in absolute showroom condition. The exterior paint retains its deep, mirror-like luster with zero swirl marks, scratches, or stone chips, further protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains pristine; the premium leather upholstery is supple with no bolster wear, the carpets are spotless, and the interior still carries that new-car scent. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, accompanied by a complete, chronological binder of all service records performed exclusively at the dealership. Every feature, from the panoramic sunroof to the advanced driver-assist systems, functions flawlessly. This is an investment-grade example that drives with the same precision and tightness as the day it was first delivered. Includes both original keys, the factory window sticker, and a custom fitted car cover.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive preservation. This unit exhibits showroom-quality aesthetics and flawless mechanical performance, representing the pinnacle of its class. Every detail, from the pristine interior surfaces to the unblemished exterior finish, reflects a history of meticulous care. This is a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast to acquire a vehicle in truly peerless condition.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, preserved in impeccable, showroom-quality condition. This specimen represents the pinnacle of its class, having been meticulously maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, affirms its status as a premier asset. For the discerning individual who demands nothing less than perfection, this offering provides an unparalleled driving experience and enduring value.

Hey everyone! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy it. It’s in absolutely incredible shape—honestly, it feels brand new! I’ve babied this car from day one, so it’s super clean inside and out and drives perfectly. If you’re looking for a ride that’s been loved and well-kept, this is the one for you. Come say hi and take a peek!

This 997.2 Carrera S is a benchmark example of naturally aspirated precision. Powered by a 3.8L DFI flat-six and mated to a crisp 6-speed manual transaxle, this vehicle features an impeccable DME report and zero bore scoring. The PASM-equipped chassis maintains factory-spec damping rates, while the cross-drilled rotors and monoblock calipers offer firm, fade-free modulation. Maintained to a concours standard, the original paint depth is consistent across all panels, and the interior shows no bolster wear or UV degradation. A mechanically flawless, collector-grade machine for the purist driver.
Mint condition. Single owner. No accidents. Garage kept. Full service records included. Flawless interior and exterior.

Step into automotive perfection with this impeccably maintained vehicle that truly defies its age. Every inch of the exterior gleams with a showroom-quality finish, free from any swirls, chips, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin remains in a time-capsule state; the premium leather upholstery is supple and unmarked, while the original floor mats look as though they’ve never been stepped on. Mechanically, it performs with the same precision and quiet confidence it had on day one, backed by a comprehensive service history and always stored in a climate-controlled garage. This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that has been treated with obsessive care, offering a like-new driving experience for the discerning collector or enthusiast who accepts nothing less than the best.

Presenting an automotive masterpiece of uncompromising quality. This vehicle remains in pristine, showroom condition, reflecting a rigorous standard of maintenance and preservation that is exceedingly rare. Every surface and mechanical component has been meticulously cared for to ensure an unparalleled driving experience. For the discerning individual who demands nothing less than absolute perfection, this offering represents the pinnacle of its class.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to a standard that reflects true showroom quality. This motorcar remains in pristine, mint condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and benefiting from a rigorous maintenance history. For the discerning buyer seeking an uncompromising fusion of performance and aesthetic perfection, this offering represents the absolute pinnacle of its class.

Hey there! You've gotta see this absolute beauty! 🚗✨ I've taken such good care of her, she’s honestly in showroom condition—not a single scratch or dent to be found. It feels and smells just like it did the day it rolled off the lot. I’m only selling because I’m looking to downsize, but I know the next owner is going to fall in love instantly. Come take a look and see for yourself!
This 1997 Acura NSX-T represents the pinnacle of mid-engine precision, featuring the 3.2L C32B V
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Clean title.

Presenting a truly breathtaking example of automotive excellence, this vehicle is offered in absolute showroom condition. Meticulously maintained by a single owner and stored in a climate-controlled garage since its original purchase, the exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish entirely free of stone chips, door dings, or swirl marks. The interior is equally pristine, featuring supple, high-grade leather that remains taut and aromatic, with zero signs of wear on the bolsters or control surfaces. Every electronic component and luxury feature functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, benefiting from a rigorous service schedule performed exclusively by factory-trained technicians; a comprehensive binder of maintenance records is included. It delivers a driving experience that is tight, responsive, and indistinguishable from new. For the discerning buyer seeking a collector-grade vehicle that requires no apologies, this is an unparalleled opportunity. Complete with all original keys, manuals, and the factory window sticker.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to an impeccable standard that mirrors its original showroom state. This unit serves as a definitive benchmark for the model, characterized by its pristine aesthetic and flawless mechanical integrity. Every surface and component reflects a rigorous commitment to preservation, offering a rare opportunity for the sophisticated buyer to acquire a specimen of unrivaled caliber. This vehicle represents the zenith of its class, curated for those who demand uncompromising excellence.
